signals.headline: South Korea March 2026 Annual Inflation Confirmed at 2
signals.raw:
South Korea March 2026 Annual Inflation Confirmed at 2.2% YoY (up from 2.0%, below 2.3-2.4% consensus)** | YES | HIGH confidence[1][2][3][4]

South Korea's Statistics Korea released March 2026 CPI data on April 2, showing annual inflation at 2.2% (from 2.0% in Feb), driven by 9.9% YoY petroleum hikes amid oil prices and weak won, but curbed by government fuel caps and vouchers; monthly rise was 0.
matched_markets: Will South Korea’s 2026 Annual Inflation be between 2.7% and 2.9%?
